hooks.command: src_changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '^src/' | head -1); doc_changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^(doc/|CLAUDE.md)' | head -1); if [ -n "$src_changed" ] && [ -z "$doc_changed" ]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "源码已变更但文档未更新。请检查是否需要同步更新 doc/ 文档和 CLAUDE.md（参考 CLAUDE.md 中的文档维护表）。"}'; fi
